input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A person in a white shirt sits at a wooden desk, raising their right hand to wave while opening their mouth. Their left hand rests on the surface near a dark rectangular box. A small packet sits on the desk's left side. Behind the individual, a dark curtain featuring a large white symbol hangs in front of a wooden door frame.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A person in a white shirt sits at a wooden desk before a dark curtain with a white symbol, waving their right hand near a small packet on the left before resting hands on a dark rectangular box. They cross their arms over their chest, looking upper right. [4-8] The individual uncrosses their arms, gripping upper arms, then extends hands to grasp the box. [8-12] They lift the box, tilting it forward and upward, holding it with the left hand while the right hand nears the mouth. [12-16] The person manipulates the box to open the packaging, revealing blue and purple graphics, and rotates it to display a white label side profile to the camera, while the small packet remains stationary.

recent_thinks: [16-18] The individual holds the dark box horizontally until a large black hair-like object and a white patterned cloth are suddenly thrown onto them. The black mass lands on their left side while the white fabric drapes over their right shoulder, partially obscuring their white shirt as they continue gripping the box.

[18-20] The individual presents the box to the camera with both hands, revealing a graphic of a white object on blue. A pile of black and white clothing rests on the table. A blurry pink item is thrown into the frame from the upper right.

samples.output: <think>The camera angle shifts to a side view, revealing a blurry dark head in the foreground. New objects appear on the table's left: a blue figurine, a white tissue box, and a small plush toy. The individual sits with crossed legs, holding the box and looking left, with the dark curtain visible on the right.</think><answer></answer>

Rules: retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR text, numbers, and state changes.

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A person in a white shirt sits at a wooden desk before a dark curtain with a white symbol, waving their right hand near a small packet on the left before resting hands on a dark rectangular box. They cross their arms over their chest, looking upper right. [4-8] The individual uncrosses their arms, gripping upper arms, then extends hands to grasp the box. [8-12] They lift the box, tilting it forward and upward, holding it with the left hand while the right hand nears the mouth. [12-16] The person manipulates the box to open the packaging, revealing blue and purple graphics, and rotates it to display a white label side profile to the camera, while the small packet remains stationary.

[16-20] The individual holds a dark box horizontally until a large black hair-like object and white patterned cloth are thrown onto them. They present the box, revealing a white object graphic on blue, while a pile of clothes rests on the table and a blurry pink item flies in. [20-24] The camera shifts to a side view with a blurry dark head in the foreground. New table items include a blue figurine, tissue box, and plush toy. The seated individual holds the box as yellow and white rectangular papers fly through the air from the right. [24-30] Blue denim jeans are placed on the lap and table edge. The individual lifts the box again while yellow papers continue fluttering around them and a white blurry object flies past their face. The papers subside, but the person maintains their grip on the box as the dark foreground obstruction persists against the blue curtain backdrop.

recent_thinks: [30-32] The view shifts to an extreme close-up of the rectangular box held directly in front of the lens. Gold text reads "LOTTE" and "PREMIUM CHOCOLATE ICE BAR" on a dark blue background. Japanese characters and an image of a white chocolate-coated ice cream bar with a dark center are clearly visible on the packaging.

[32-34] The camera maintains an extreme close-up on the dark blue packaging. The framing shifts slightly to the right, emphasizing the gold text "PREMIUM CHOCOLATE ICE BAR" and the large Japanese characters "とろける生チョコ". The graphic of the white chocolate-coated bar remains central, while the "LOTTE" logo on the left edge becomes partially cut off from the view.

[34-36] The view remains an extreme close-up of the dark blue box held in front of a white shirt. The framing adjusts slightly right, removing the 'LOTTE' logo from the left edge while centering the gold English text and Japanese characters above the image of the white chocolate-coated bar and blue ribbon graphic.

[36-38] The view shifts slightly left, bringing the gold "LOTTE" logo into full view at the top left corner of the dark blue packaging. A red rectangular label with white Japanese text "[期間限定]" becomes clearly visible on the lower left, positioned above an image of dark chocolate squares adjacent to the white chocolate-coated ice cream bar graphic.

[38-40] The camera zooms in slightly on the left portion of the dark blue box held steady. The gold "LOTTE" logo and red "[期間限定]" label remain prominent. Smaller text beneath the red label, reading "~冬春期限定~", becomes clearer alongside the image of dark chocolate squares.

[40-42] The scene cuts to a wide shot of the individual in a white shirt sitting at the wooden desk, holding the dark box horizontally. A bright green plush toy is suddenly thrown onto the desk, blurring in motion as it lands near the person's hands.

[42-44] A bright green plush toy lies motionless on the wooden desk in front of the seated individual. The person, wearing a white button-down shirt, holds the dark rectangular box horizontally with both hands, looking down at the packaging while the toy remains stationary on the table surface next to a hanging white cloth.
